summary:
A delay of at least 30 minutes after mixing addition silicones allows hydrogen gas generated during polymerization to safely dissipate, preventing bubble formation and pitting in the final cast. This delayed pouring significantly improves cast quality by enhancing surface finish and structural integrity.
